aesthetic_direction: The design should evoke trust and reliability, reflecting the serious nature of property management. Clean lines, ample whitespace, and a professional color palette will create a sense of stability and competence. The overall feel should be modern and efficient, avoiding trendy or overly playful elements.

page_inventory.name: Homepage / Landing
page_inventory.purpose: Primary conversion page — capture signups and demonstrate value
page_inventory.layout: Hero with score visualization → social proof strip → 3 feature cards → testimonials → CTA section → footer
page_inventory.content_requirements: Headline, subheadline, primary CTA, 3 feature descriptions, 3+ testimonials, trust badges

page_inventory.name: Dashboard
page_inventory.purpose: Central hub for property management overview and key insights
page_inventory.layout: Top navigation → Property Overview → Key Metrics (Rent Collection, Occupancy) → AI Insights → Quick Actions
page_inventory.content_requirements: Property count, rent collection rate, occupancy rate, AI-driven recommendations, shortcuts to common tasks

page_inventory.name: Tenant Applications
page_inventory.purpose: Manage and process tenant applications efficiently
page_inventory.layout: Filter and Search → Application List → Application Details (on selection)
page_inventory.content_requirements: Application status filters, search by applicant name, detailed applicant information, screening results

page_inventory.name: Property Inspections
page_inventory.purpose: Schedule, track, and manage property inspections
page_inventory.layout: Calendar View → Inspection List → Inspection Details (on selection)
page_inventory.content_requirements: Calendar view of scheduled inspections, list of upcoming/past inspections, inspection checklists, photo uploads

page_inventory.name: Smart Scheduling & Booking
page_inventory.purpose: Automate property showings and booking management
page_inventory.layout: Calendar View → Availability Management → Booking Requests
page_inventory.content_requirements: Calendar view of property availability, form to set available times, list of booking requests, automated confirmation emails

page_inventory.name: Customizable Workflows
page_inventory.purpose: Automate repetitive tasks and streamline property management processes
page_inventory.content_requirements: List of pre-built and custom workflows, drag-and-drop workflow editor, trigger and action configuration

page_inventory.name: Free Trial Signup
page_inventory.purpose: Capture user information and initiate the free trial period
page_inventory.layout: Form with key information capture → Benefit highlights → CTA
page_inventory.content_requirements: Name, email, property count, benefit statements, clear call to action

page_inventory.name: Google OAuth Callback
page_inventory.purpose: Handle the Google OAuth authentication process

page_inventory.name: Lease Management
page_inventory.content_requirements: Lease agreement details, tenant information, payment schedules, renewal options

page_inventory.name: Payment Collection
page_inventory.purpose: Collect rent payments and manage financial transactions
page_inventory.content_requirements: Payment history, tenant information, payment status, online payment options

page_inventory.name: Maintenance Requests
page_inventory.purpose: Manage and track maintenance requests from tenants
page_inventory.content_requirements: Request details, tenant information, status updates, communication log

page_inventory.name: Landlord Portal
page_inventory.purpose: Provide landlords with a comprehensive overview of their properties and tenants
page_inventory.layout: Property List → Tenant List → AI Insights
page_inventory.content_requirements: Property overview, tenant information, AI-driven insights, quick actions

page_inventory.name: Admin Panel
page_inventory.purpose: Manage system settings, user accounts, and platform configurations
page_inventory.content_requirements: User management, system settings, billing information, support resources

page_inventory.name: Developer Portal
page_inventory.purpose: Provide developers with resources and tools to integrate with the platform
page_inventory.layout: API Documentation → SDK Downloads → Support Forum
page_inventory.content_requirements: API documentation, SDK downloads, support forum access, integration guides

page_inventory.name: Contact Us
page_inventory.purpose: Provide users with a way to contact support or sales
page_inventory.content_requirements: Contact form, email address, phone number, support resources

page_inventory.name: Pricing
page_inventory.content_requirements: Pricing tiers (Starter, Professional, Business, Enterprise), feature comparison, FAQ section

user_flows.name: New User Signup → First Value
steps: Landing page hero CTA → Signup modal → Goal selection → Quick assessment → Dashboard with first score → Guided tour of primary tool

user_flows.name: Tenant Submits Maintenance Request
steps: Tenant Portal → Maintenance Request Form → Submit Request → Confirmation Message

user_flows.name: Landlord Approves Tenant Application
steps: Landlord Dashboard → Application List → Application Details → Approve Application

feature_specs.name: Property Listings and Marketing
feature_specs.description: Allows users to list their properties and market them to potential tenants.
feature_specs.ui_approach: Card-based layout with high-quality property images, key details, and a clear call to action. Integration with social media for easy sharing.

feature_specs.name: Tenant Screening
feature_specs.description: Provides tools to screen potential tenants, including background checks and credit reports.
feature_specs.ui_approach: Multi-step form with clear instructions and progress indicators. Integration with third-party screening services.

feature_specs.name: Lease Management
feature_specs.description: Helps users manage lease agreements, including creation, signing, and tracking.
feature_specs.ui_approach: Digital lease signing with secure authentication. Automated reminders for lease renewals and expirations.

feature_specs.name: Online Rent Collection
feature_specs.description: Enables tenants to pay rent online and landlords to track payments.
feature_specs.ui_approach: Secure payment gateway integration. Automated rent reminders and late fee calculations.

feature_specs.name: Accounting and Financial Reporting
feature_specs.description: Provides tools for managing finances, generating reports, and tracking expenses.
feature_specs.ui_approach: Interactive charts and graphs to visualize financial data. Customizable reports with export options.

feature_specs.name: Maintenance Request Management
feature_specs.description: Allows tenants to submit maintenance requests and landlords to track and manage them.
feature_specs.ui_approach: Mobile-friendly interface for submitting requests with photos and descriptions. Automated notifications for status updates.

feature_specs.name: Tenant Communication Tools
feature_specs.description: Provides tools for communicating with tenants, including email, SMS, and in-app messaging.
feature_specs.ui_approach: Real-time messaging with push notifications. Customizable email templates for common communications.

feature_specs.name: Document Management
feature_specs.description: Allows users to store and manage important documents, such as lease agreements and insurance policies.
feature_specs.ui_approach: Secure document storage with version control. Integration with cloud storage services.

feature_specs.name: Reporting and Analytics
feature_specs.description: Provides insights into property performance, tenant behavior, and market trends.
feature_specs.ui_approach: Interactive dashboards with key performance indicators (KPIs). Customizable reports with export options.

feature_specs.name: Mobile Accessibility
feature_specs.description: Provides access to the platform on mobile devices.
feature_specs.ui_approach: Responsive design that adapts to different screen sizes. Native mobile apps for iOS and Android.

feature_specs.name: AI-powered Automation for Predictive Maintenance
feature_specs.description: Uses AI to predict potential maintenance issues and automate maintenance scheduling.
feature_specs.ui_approach: Alerts and notifications for predicted maintenance needs. Automated scheduling of maintenance tasks.

feature_specs.name: Integrated Smart Scheduling and Booking System
feature_specs.description: Allows users to schedule property showings and manage bookings efficiently.
feature_specs.ui_approach: Calendar integration with automated booking confirmations. Real-time availability updates.

feature_specs.name: Extensive Setup Guides and Dedicated Backend Support
feature_specs.description: Provides users with comprehensive setup guides and dedicated backend support.
feature_specs.ui_approach: Step-by-step setup wizard with helpful tips and resources. Access to a dedicated support team.

feature_specs.name: Advanced Google Maps Integration for Property Visualization
feature_specs.description: Provides users with an interactive map view of their properties and surrounding areas.
feature_specs.ui_approach: Interactive map with property markers and detailed information. Integration with Google Street View.

shadows.style: Subtle, layered soft shadows to provide depth and visual hierarchy without being distracting.

micro_interactions: Button press feedback with subtle scale and color shift
Inline form validation with smooth error/success transitions
Progress indicators for multi-step workflows (onboarding, lease setup)
Skeleton loading states instead of spinners
Hover effects on property cards revealing quick-action buttons
Action confirmation toasts that slide in and auto-dismiss
Dashboard widget count-up animations on data load
Drag-and-drop reorder with placeholder ghost elements

layout.hero_style: Clear, concise messaging with a single strong value proposition, property visuals or dashboard preview, and a prominent CTA. Minimalist with depth — subtle gradients or layered cards to create dimension without clutter.
layout.card_style: Rounded corners, subtle shadows, clean background, clear typography.
layout.navigation_style: Adaptive sidebar that collapses on mobile and responds to user behavior. AppShell pattern with persistent top bar for global actions and collapsible left sidebar for section navigation. Intuitive — users find what they need without thinking.

css_variables: :root { --color-primary: #008080; --color-primary-light: #33a3a3; --color-primary-dark: #006666; --color-secondary: #E0E0E0; --color-accent: #FF6B35; --color-background: #FFFFFF; --color-surface: #FFFFFF; --color-surface-elevated: #FFFFFF; --color-text-primary: #1A1A2E; --color-text-secondary: #6599ac; --color-text-muted: #94a3b8; --color-border: #cbd5e1; --color-success: #34d399; --color-warning: #fde047; --color-error: #ef4444; --font-display: 'Manrope', sans-serif; --font-heading: 'Manrope', sans-serif; --font-body: 'Inter', sans-serif; --font-mono: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; --radius-sm: 0.125rem; --radius-md: 0.375rem; --radius-lg: 0.5rem; --radius-full: 9999px; --shadow-sm: 0 1px 2px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05); --shadow-md: 0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1), 0 2px 4px -1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06); --shadow-lg: 0 10px 15px -3px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1), 0 4px 6px -2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05); }

asset_prompts.prompt: A professional and trustworthy hero image for a real estate management platform. The scene depicts a modern office space with a diverse team collaborating around a large screen displaying property data and analytics. The mood is confident, efficient, and forward-thinking. The composition is clean and balanced, with ample whitespace. The color palette uses the app's primary colors (#091a2b, #005163, #3b4876) with accents of light gray and white. The viewer should feel that the platform is reliable, data-driven, and capable of simplifying property management.

OG card with the app name 'RealEstate AI' and the tagline 'Property management, powered by intelligence' overlaid on a branded background that matches the design personality. The background should be a gradient of the app's primary colors (#091a2b and #005163) with a subtle geometric pattern. The text should be white and easy to read. The overall design should be clean, professional, and trustworthy.

mobile_design.app_icon_description: A stylized illustration of a building with a subtle AI circuit board pattern overlaid on the facade. The building should be rendered in the app's primary color (#091a2b) with the circuit board pattern in the secondary color (#005163). The background should be a light gray (#f1f3f4). The overall design should be modern, professional, and convey the platform's focus on AI-powered property management.
mobile_design.splash_screen_description: A simple and elegant splash screen with a solid background in the app's primary color (#091a2b). The app's logo (a simplified version of the app icon) should be centered on the screen in white. A subtle animation (e.g., a fade-in or a scaling effect) should be used to reveal the logo. The overall design should be clean, professional, and create a sense of anticipation.
mobile_design.color_adjustments: Use #000000 backgrounds for OLED screens in dark mode. Increase contrast ratios for outdoor readability — text should meet WCAG AAA standards on mobile.

mobile_asset_prompts.prompt: A stylized illustration of a building with a subtle AI circuit board pattern overlaid on the facade. The building should be rendered in the app's primary color (#091a2b) with the circuit board pattern in the secondary color (#005163). The background should be a light gray (#f1f3f4). The overall design should be modern, professional, and convey the platform's focus on AI-powered property management.

A simple and elegant splash screen with a solid background in the app's primary color (#091a2b). The app's logo (a simplified version of the app icon) should be centered on the screen in white. A subtle animation (e.g., a fade-in or a scaling effect) should be used to reveal the logo. The overall design should be clean, professional, and create a sense of anticipation.

A mockup of the app's dashboard screen, showcasing the key features and benefits of the platform. The screenshot should include the property overview, key metrics (rent collection, occupancy), and AI insights. The design should be clean, professional, and easy to understand. The screenshot should also include the app's logo and name.
